_comment: INJECTED for #881 — do NOT overwrite on re-record. The first submit of this clip returns a content-rejection 422 (sequenceIndex 0); the motion workflow's submit→poll retry loop re-submits and the success (no sequenceIndex, matches every later call) lands, so the frame still ends videoStatus=completed. Exercises the motion content-flag retry inside the full pipeline; the existing 'every frame has video' assertion proves the rescue. No-index success keeps the full-sequence test retriable in CI (on a Playwright retry the error fixture is already consumed). Re-apply this two-entry shape (error first) if you re-record.

match.userMessage: Handheld camera tracks forward at eye level, following Scarlett walking steadily along the promenade toward the shoreline. She raises one hand to tuck hair behind her ear, then bends to lower the lipstick tube into the wet sand beside her bare foot and straightens up. A shallow wave rolls in, curls around her ankles and nudges the lipstick before receding. She steps sideways through the foam as another wave gathers.

error.message: The model did not generate the expected output for this prompt. It may contain unsafe content.
